hero.title: Snapchat Max
hero.subtitle: Unlimited Features. No Limits.
hero.description: Download the latest modified Snapchat with premium features unlocked.

items.title: Unlimited Filters & Lenses
items.description: Access all premium filters and lenses without any restrictions.

items.title: Save Snaps Secretly
items.description: Save any snap without notifying the sender. Complete privacy.

items.title: No Ads
items.description: Enjoy ad-free experience with zero interruptions.

items.title: HD Media Upload
items.description: Upload photos and videos in full HD quality.

items.title: Privacy Control
items.description: Advanced privacy settings to control who sees your content.

items.question: Is it safe?
items.answer: Yes, Snapchat Max is regularly tested and scanned for malware. However, as with any modified app, use at your own discretion.

items.question: Will I get banned?
items.answer: While we implement advanced anti-ban measures, using modified apps always carries some risk. We recommend using a secondary account.

items.question: How to install?
items.answer: Download the APK file, enable "Install from Unknown Sources" in your Android settings, and run the installer. Detailed instructions are included with the download.
